        public void readOldHeader(java.lang.String f)

      • main

        public static void main(java.lang.String[] args)
        searches files for old and new headers. If an old header is found, the new one is inserted instead. If a new one is found, nothing happens. Some statistics is finally printed. Comments signs are used as in the commentsstart, commentsend arrays. Lines in notToRemove are skipped and the header is inserted after them.
        Parameters:
        args - First parameter contains the file to start from. If it is a directory all files below that directory are considered. Second parameter is a String describing the file where the new header can be found. This file should be text without any comment characters. The Third parameter is the filename of the old header that is to be replaced by the new header. The third one is optional.
